narration: You just saved $34 at checkout — nice. But that store card they handed you is designed to take back way more than that.
visual: Dark background. A checkout counter SVG with a smiling cashier figure, a credit card being handed over, and a large '20% OFF TODAY' sign. '$34 SAVINGS' bubble in green appears, then fades as a red debt arrow grows beneath it. Scene title 'THE CHECKOUT TRAP' springs in.

narration: Store credit cards charge 28.9% interest on average — nearly ten points higher than a regular card. Most people never notice until the bill hits.
visual: Light background. Two large credit cards side by side: left card labeled 'STORE CARD' with 28.9% APR in red, right card labeled 'REGULAR CARD' with 20.7% APR in gray. A gap arrow between them shows '+8.2%' in red. Bar chart comparing rates fills in below each card.

narration: Forty-two percent of people who open store cards carry a balance. That $34 savings is already gone — and now the interest clock is ticking.
visual: Dark background. Large '42%' counter animates in. A person silhouette holds a gift/receipt on one side showing '$34 SAVED' with a strikethrough, while on the other side a ticking clock with dollar signs accumulates interest. Text 'CARRY A BALANCE' underneath the percentage.

narration: Carry $1,200 on a store card at 28.9% and it takes two years to pay off. Total cost: $2,800. You spent $1,200.
visual: Light background. A large calculator SVG displays '$1,200'. A progress bar fills showing '2 YEARS OF PAYMENTS'. Below, two boxes: 'WHAT YOU BOUGHT: $1,200' and 'WHAT YOU PAID: $2,800' — the gap between them highlighted in red labeled 'INTEREST: $1,600'.

narration: Every store card signup triggers a hard inquiry — up to ten points off your score. Three checkouts, three signups? That's up to thirty points gone.
visual: Dark background. A credit score gauge animates from 720 down toward 690, needle dropping. Three red 'HARD INQUIRY' labels appear stacked, each dropping the needle further. Final score shown: '690' in red with '-30 pts' badge. Text: 'THREE CHECKOUTS = THIRTY POINTS GONE'.

narration: The fix is simple: say no at checkout. Use a flat 2% cashback card instead, and follow for more money traps hiding in plain sight.
visual: Light background. Two credit cards: store card on left with a large red X, flat cashback card on right with a green checkmark labeled '2% CASHBACK'. Arrow from bad to good card. Three-step action list: 1) Say no at the register 2) Use a 2% flat card instead 3) Never open cards for one-time discounts. Red 'FOLLOW FOR MORE MONEY TRAPS' CTA at bottom.
